message:
feat(ftui): build base ftui app shell with Model impl (FTUI-05.1)

Rewrite ftui_stub.rs from placeholder to a working ftui app shell:
- WaModel implementing ftui::Model (init/update/view cycle)
- View enum with shortcut/next/prev navigation
- Global keybinding dispatch (q, Tab, BackTab, ?, 1-7)
- CellStyle abstraction bridging ftui-style and ftui-render StyleFlags
- Tab bar, content placeholder, and footer rendering via write_styled
- run_tui entry point wrapping ftui::App::fullscreen(model).run()
- 7 unit tests for View navigation and state defaults

Also fix clippy redundant_pub_crate lint on GATE_TEST_LOCK in output_gate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
